text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well? How's my smile? They say fortune<n>comes to
the most joyous!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now it's your turn! That's it, raise your<n>hands
and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Tickle, tickle, tickle! Laughter will bringyou even more luck! ♪
